steps.title: Use the persuasion context
steps.content: Researchers argued that Bronze Age societies were ruled by men. The burial of a high-status woman may persuade them to accept that women may also have held leadership roles.

steps.title: Pick the admission verb
steps.content: A means give up a right, not acknowledge a claim. C means disprove, which contradicts the evidence. D means demand or make necessary, which does not fit the sentence. The needed verb means admit or acknowledge. The answer is B.
